mapper.select: SELECT record_id, user_id, class_id, attendance_date, start_time, end_time, event_type_id, working_hours, break_time_minutes, overtime_hours, night_shift_hours, holiday_work_hours, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM attendance_records WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT record_id, user_id, class_id, attendance_date, start_time, end_time, event_type_id, working_hours, break_time_minutes, overtime_hours, night_shift_hours, holiday_work_hours, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM attendance_records WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND is_deleted = false FOR UPDATE

SELECT record_id, user_id, class_id, attendance_date, start_time, end_time, event_type_id, working_hours, break_time_minutes, overtime_hours, night_shift_hours, holiday_work_hours, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM attendance_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND attendance_date >= ( #{attendanceDate}::DATE AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tokyo') AND attendance_date < ((#{attendanceDate}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tokyo') AND is_deleted = false

SELECT record_id, user_id, class_id, attendance_date, start_time, end_time, event_type_id, working_hours, break_time_minutes, overtime_hours, night_shift_hours, holiday_work_hours, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM attendance_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND attendance_date >= ( #{attendanceDate}::DATE AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tokyo') AND attendance_date < ((#{attendanceDate}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tokyo') AND is_deleted = false FOR UPDATE

SELECT record_id, user_id, class_id, attendance_date, start_time, end_time, event_type_id, working_hours, break_time_minutes, overtime_hours, night_shift_hours, holiday_work_hours, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM attendance_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND attendance_date >= (MAKE_DATE( CASE WHEN #{month} = 1 THEN #{year} - 1 ELSE #{year} END, CASE WHEN #{month} = 1 THEN 12 ELSE #{month} - 1 END, 21) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tokyo') AND attendance_date < (MAKE_DATE(#{year}, #{month}, 21) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tokyo') AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY attendance_date ASC

SELECT record_id, user_id, class_id, attendance_date, start_time, end_time, event_type_id, working_hours, break_time_minutes, overtime_hours, night_shift_hours, holiday_work_hours, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM attendance_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY attendance_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_records (user_id, class_id, attendance_date, start_time, end_time, event_type_id, working_hours, break_time_minutes, overtime_hours, night_shift_hours, holiday_work_hours, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{classId}, #{attendanceDate,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{startTime,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{eventTypeId}, #{workingHours}, COALESCE(#{breakTimeMinutes}, 0), #{overtimeHours}, COALESCE(#{nightShiftHours}, 0.0), #{holidayWorkHours}, #{remarks}, NOW(), NOW(), COALESCE(#{isDeleted}, false))
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_records SET user_id = #{userId}, class_id = #{classId}, attendance_date = #{attendanceDate,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, start_time = #{startTime,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, event_type_id = #{eventTypeId}, working_hours = #{workingHours}, break_time_minutes = COALESCE(#{breakTimeMinutes}, 0), overtime_hours = #{overtimeHours}, night_shift_hours = COALESCE(#{nightShiftHours}, 0.0), holiday_work_hours = #{holidayWorkHours}, remarks = #{remarks}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
UPDATE attendance_records SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
UPDATE attendance_records SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT record_id, user_id, class_id, attendance_date, start_time, end_time, event_type_id, working_hours, break_time_minutes, overtime_hours, night_shift_hours, holiday_work_hours, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM attendance_records WHERE attendance_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY user_id ASC, attendance_date ASC
